## Final Rule

AIM v0.2 Sprint 3 connects static preview, local records, journal reference, decision snapshot, PAI-SAFE state, and human review boundary into a bounded viewer.

The viewer reflects governed intelligence.

The viewer does not govern, approve, execute, advise, mutate records, mutate journals, or create truth.
